who: HR professionals in small to medium-sized businesses using BambooHR, processing 5–15 employee records/month
offer: For HR professionals in small to medium-sized businesses using BambooHR processing 5–15 employee records/month, regulatory compliance tracking issues cause potential legal penalties. We provide a streamlined compliance tracking service instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and outdated resources.
problem: Difficulty in tracking regulatory compliance updates and ensuring adherence to labor laws.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR professionals seeking help
Indie Hackers discussions about compliance tracking
DM outreach to HR professionals with demo video
Engage in community forums for HR tools
try_it: Let users try Compliance checklist for labor laws and Simple reporting tool for compliance status on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the service
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
